suite.name: Test Runtime

kw.name: Netlab Up
Netlab Up
kw.msg: ${stdout} = Creating configuration files [CONFIG] spine1: normalize,initial,spine,isis-timers,isis-auth,bfd [CONFIG] spine2: normalize,initial,spine,isis-timers,isis-auth,bfd [CONFIG] leaf1: normalize,initial,...

${stderr} = 23:22:00 INFO Containerlab started version=0.76.0 23:22:00 INFO Parsing & checking topology file=clab.yml 23:22:00 INFO Removing directory path=/home/alfredk/Projects/dc_design_labs/source/lab_03/netl...
kw.doc: Run `netlab up` to start the lab.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.
Start the lab via `netlab up`. Fails if any node is unreachable or config deployment fails.

test.name: Lab Should Start Successfully

kw.name: Pass Execution
kw.msg: Execution passed with message: Lab started successfully
kw.doc: Skips rest of the current test, setup, or teardown with PASS status.

test.doc: Verified by Suite Setup (netlab up).

test.name: All Nodes Should Run Arista cEOS

kw.name: Verify All Nodes Respond
Run Show Command
Run Show Command
kw.msg:
${output} = Arista cEOSLab Hardware version: Serial number: C7DF44C3D8BE428664797B55E4DC5F9F Hardware MAC address: 001c.73b6.52d1 System MAC address: 001c.73b6.52d1
Software image version: 4.34.2.2F-46218727.43...

Software image version: 4.34.2.2F-46218727.43...

Verify all nodes respond with correct version.

test.name: All Data Interfaces Should Be Up On Spine Nodes

kw.name: Run Show Command
Run Show Command
kw.doc: Keyword alias for netlab_connect_show.
Run `netlab connect <node> --show <cmd>` and return output.

kw.name: Get Regexp Matches
kw.msg: ${up_count} = ['Ethernet1 10.2.1.0/31 up up', 'Ethernet2 10.2.1.2/31 up up', 'Ethernet3 10.2.1.4/31 up up']
kw.doc: Returns a list of all non-overlapping matches in the given string.

kw.name: Length Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the length of the given item is correct.

kw.name: Run Show Command
Run Show Command
kw.doc: Keyword alias for netlab_connect_show.
Run `netlab connect <node> --show <cmd>` and return output.

kw.name: Get Regexp Matches
kw.msg: ${up_count} = ['Ethernet1 10.2.2.0/31 up up', 'Ethernet2 10.2.2.2/31 up up', 'Ethernet3 10.2.2.4/31 up up']
kw.doc: Returns a list of all non-overlapping matches in the given string.

kw.name: Length Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the length of the given item is correct.

test.doc: Verify Loopback0 interface status is up/up.

test.name: IS-IS Neighbors Should Be UP On Spine1

kw.name: Run Show Command
Run Show Command
kw.msg: ${output} = Instance VRF System Id Type Interface SNPA State Hold time Circuit Id CORE default leaf1 L2 Ethernet1 P2P UP ...
kw.doc: Keyword alias for netlab_connect_show.

kw.msg: ${output} = Instance VRF System Id Type Interface SNPA State Hold time Circuit Id CORE default leaf1 L2 Ethernet1 P2P UP ...

test.doc: Verify IS-IS instance name is CORE.

test.name: IS-IS Should Distribute Routes On Spine1

kw.name: Run Show Command
Run Show Command
kw.msg: ${output} = VRF: default Source Codes: C - connected, S - static, K - kernel, O - OSPF, O IA - OSPF inter area, O E1 - OSPF external type 1, O E2 - OSPF external type 2, O N1 - OSPF NSSA exte...
kw.doc: Keyword alias for netlab_connect_show.

kw.msg: ${output} = VRF: default Source Codes: C - connected, S - static, K - kernel, O - OSPF, O IA - OSPF inter area, O E1 - OSPF external type 1, O E2 - OSPF external type 2, O N1 - OSPF NSSA exte...
kw.doc: Run `netlab connect <node> --show <cmd>` and return output.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.arg: spine1 should have route to spine2
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.arg: spine1 should have route to leaf1
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.arg: spine1 should have route to leaf2
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.arg: spine1 should have route to spine2-leaf1
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.arg: spine1 should have route to spine2-leaf2
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.arg: spine1 should have route to spine2-leaf3
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

test.doc: spine1 should have IS-IS routes to spine2 and all leaf loopbacks.

test.name: IS-IS Should Distribute Routes On Leaf1

kw.name: Run Show Command
Run Show Command

kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Get Regexp Matches
kw.doc: Returns a list of all non-overlapping matches in the given string.

kw.name: Length Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the length of the given item is correct.

test.doc: spine2 should have 3 BFD sessions to leaves.

test.name: BFD Timers Should Be 100ms Interval With Multiplier 3 On Spine1

kw.name: Run Show Command
Run Show Command
kw.msg: ${output} = VRF name: default ----------------- Peer Addr 10.2.1.1, Intf Ethernet1, Type normal, Role active, State Up VRF default, LAddr 10.2.1.0, LD/RD 1448398789/2301188574 Session state is Up and not using ec...
kw.doc: Keyword alias for netlab_connect_show.

kw.msg: ${output} = VRF name: default ----------------- Peer Addr 10.2.1.1, Intf Ethernet1, Type normal, Role active, State Up VRF default, LAddr 10.2.1.0, LD/RD 1448398789/2301188574 Session state is Up and not using ec...
kw.doc: Run `netlab connect <node> --show <cmd>` and return output.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

test.name: BFD Should Be Registered With IS-IS On Leaf1

kw.name: Run Show Command
Run Show Command
kw.msg: ${output} = VRF name: default ----------------- Peer Addr 10.2.1.0, Intf Ethernet1, Type normal, Role active, State Up VRF default, LAddr 10.2.1.1, LD/RD 2301188574/1448398789 Session state is Up and not using ec...

kw.msg: ${output} = VRF name: default ----------------- Peer Addr 10.2.1.0, Intf Ethernet1, Type normal, Role active, State Up VRF default, LAddr 10.2.1.1, LD/RD 2301188574/1448398789 Session state is Up and not using ec...
kw.doc: Run `netlab connect <node> --show <cmd>` and return output.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

test.doc: Verify BFD is registered with IS-IS protocol.

test.name: Ping spine1 To leaf1 Loopback Should Succeed

kw.name: Run Ping Command
Run Ping
kw.msg: ${output} = PING 10.0.11.1 (10.0.11.1) from 10.0.1.1 : 72(100) bytes of data. 80 bytes from 10.0.11.1: icmp_seq=1 ttl=64 time=0.099 ms 80 bytes from 10.0.11.1: icmp_seq=2 ttl=64 time=0.031 ms 80 bytes from 10.0.1...
kw.doc: Ping from a node via `netlab connect` (no show prefix).

kw.msg: ${output} = PING 10.0.11.1 (10.0.11.1) from 10.0.1.1 : 72(100) bytes of data. 80 bytes from 10.0.11.1: icmp_seq=1 ttl=64 time=0.099 ms 80 bytes from 10.0.11.1: icmp_seq=2 ttl=64 time=0.031 ms 80 bytes from 10.0.1...
kw.doc: Ping from a node via `netlab connect`.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

test.name: Ping leaf3 To spine2 Loopback Should Succeed

kw.name: Run Ping Command
Run Ping
kw.msg: ${output} = PING 10.0.2.1 (10.0.2.1) from 10.0.13.1 : 72(100) bytes of data. 80 bytes from 10.0.2.1: icmp_seq=1 ttl=64 time=0.060 ms 80 bytes from 10.0.2.1: icmp_seq=2 ttl=64 time=0.029 ms 80 bytes from 10.0.2.1:...

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

test.name: Lab Should Tear Down Successfully

kw.name: Pass Execution
kw.msg: Execution passed with message: Lab torn down successfully
kw.doc: Skips rest of the current test, setup, or teardown with PASS status.

test.doc: Verified by Suite Teardown (netlab down).

kw.name: Run Keywords
Wait For Topology To Stabilize
Sleep
kw.msg: Wait for IS-IS adjacencies and BFD sessions
kw.arg: Wait for IS-IS adjacencies and BFD sessions
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.
Wait for adjacencies to fully establish after lab startup.

kw.name: Netlab Down
Netlab Down
kw.msg: ${stdout} = Checking virtualization provider installation OK: clab installed and working correctly Stopping clab nodes

${stderr} = 23:24:32 INFO Parsing & checking topology file=clab.yml 23:24:32 INFO Parsing & checking topology file=clab.yml 23:24:32 INFO Destroying lab name=netlab 23:24:32 INFO Removed container name=clab-netla...
kw.doc: Run `netlab down` to tear down the lab.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.
Tear down the lab via `netlab down`.
Executes all the given keywords in a sequence.

suite.doc: Runtime tests — validates POD after `netlab up`: - Lab lifecycle (netlab up / netlab down) - Node version and reachability - Interface status (up/up) - IS-IS adjacencies (neighbors UP) - IS-IS route exchange (all loopbacks learned) - BFD sessions (state Up, correct timers) - End-to-end ping (spine-to-leaf, leaf-to-leaf, leaf-to-spine)
